title: AI Tool Evaluation Kit, SaaS Comparison Templates, Google Sheets + Notion, Budget Calculator, Decision Matrix Digital Download
description:
Stop subscribing to AI tools on impulse. Evaluate them like investments with this complete decision kit.

The average professional pays for 3-5 AI tools and actively uses 1-2. This kit gives you a repeatable system to score, compare, and choose the right tools before you buy.

WHAT YOU GET:

1. AI TOOL EVALUATION FRAMEWORK (PDF + Notion)
Score any AI tool across 8 dimensions: output quality, workflow integration, learning curve, pricing value, scalability, support, data privacy, feature roadmap. Includes specific questions and 1-5 scoring rubric.

2. SIDE-BY-SIDE COMPARISON TEMPLATES (Google Sheets + Notion)
Pre-built sheets for 12 AI tool categories: writing, image gen, code assistants, SEO, email marketing, social media, CRM, automation, design, video, analytics, project management. Top 5-8 tools listed per category with current pricing.

3. DECISION MATRIX (Google Sheets)
Weighted scoring model. Set your priorities, plug in scores, get a ranked recommendation. Works for any category.

4. AI BUDGET CALCULATOR (Google Sheets)
Track total spend, cost per active tool, cost per use hour. Includes tool overlap detector that flags duplicate subscriptions.

5. 12 CATEGORY GUIDES (PDF)
One-page guides per category: what to look for, common traps, which free tiers actually work, and the "pick one" recommendation.

FORMAT: PDF + Google Sheets + Notion template (all included)
